message:
feat(fsqlite-types): make asupersync dependency optional behind native feature flag

The asupersync runtime dependency is now gated behind a `native` feature
(enabled by default) so that fsqlite-types can be compiled for non-native
targets (e.g. WASM) without pulling in the full async runtime. This also
syncs the beads issue tracker state.

- Add `[features]` section with `default = ["native"]` and `native = ["dep:asupersync"]`
- Change `asupersync` from unconditional to `optional = true`
- Sync .beads/issues.jsonl with current tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
